verses.text: The land is divided by lot, as the LORD commanded. By lot. Inheritance is fairly shared.

Caleb recalls his faithful report at Kadesh. Caleb. He followed God fully.

At eighty-five, he asks, 'Give me this mountain.' This mountain. Faith claims the promise.

Joshua gives him Hebron; the land rests from war. Granted. The faithful inherit.
